description: Talk to the victim Sophie to understand their emotional state and motive.
Post a public comment that challenges the bully Liam’s framing of the doxxing. Refute claims that justify or minimize the harm.
Publicly point out that doxxing is a federal crime under the Interstate Doxxing Prevention Act. Challenge the bully Liam’s justification by referencing legal or ethical standards.
Post a public comment showing the victim Sophie they are not alone. Affirm their belonging and express empathy to help restore their trust.
Encourage others to take collective action. Ask bystanders to downvote, report the post, and avoid sharing or saving the harmful content.

next_steps.content: Just reported it. This isn’t okay and definitely crosses a line. No one deserves to have their private stuff posted like that.
Yeah, I downvoted too. This isn’t drama—it’s dangerous. Let’s not make this worse by spreading it.
If you’ve saved or shared the post, delete it. Respect her privacy. We need to be better than this.
